## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Vapi and GrowthX to discuss content strategy progress and next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/QpumFJ5rqto-8bEBzdGtqyXyEAUpyxJQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content production ramping up: 1 article published, 2 more coming soon, aiming for 50 pieces/month](https://fathom.video/share/QpumFJ5rqto-8bEBzdGtqyXyEAUpyxJQ?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [Templates being developed for 5 content types to increase velocity (alternatives, comparisons, integrations, use cases, guides)](https://fathom.video/share/QpumFJ5rqto-8bEBzdGtqyXyEAUpyxJQ?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
  - [First programmatic SEO page targeted for launch by end of tomorrow or early next week](https://fathom.video/share/QpumFJ5rqto-8bEBzdGtqyXyEAUpyxJQ?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)
  - [Improved communication and visibility into content roadmap and timelines forthcoming](https://fathom.video/share/QpumFJ5rqto-8bEBzdGtqyXyEAUpyxJQ?tab=summary&timestamp=103.0)

## Topics

### Content Production Progress

  - [Published: Vapi vs Twilio comparison article](https://fathom.video/share/QpumFJ5rqto-8bEBzdGtqyXyEAUpyxJQ?tab=summary&timestamp=125.0)
  - [Coming soon: "What is STT" and "What is TTS" foundational articles](https://fathom.video/share/QpumFJ5rqto-8bEBzdGtqyXyEAUpyxJQ?tab=summary&timestamp=136.0)
  - [Targeting 3 new articles next week (one for each template type), then scaling up](https://fathom.video/share/QpumFJ5rqto-8bEBzdGtqyXyEAUpyxJQ?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Goal: \~50 content pieces (\~50,000 words) per month once at full velocity](https://fathom.video/share/QpumFJ5rqto-8bEBzdGtqyXyEAUpyxJQ?tab=summary&timestamp=452.0)

### Content Strategy Framework

  - [Developing templates for 5 content types to increase production speed:](https://fathom.video/share/QpumFJ5rqto-8bEBzdGtqyXyEAUpyxJQ?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)
    1.  Alternatives
    2.  Comparisons
    3.  Integrations
    4.  Use cases/listicles
    5.  Definitional guides
  - [Templates will be shared with Vapi team tomorrow for feedback](https://fathom.video/share/QpumFJ5rqto-8bEBzdGtqyXyEAUpyxJQ?tab=summary&timestamp=333.0)
  - [Focus on bottom-funnel content initially](https://fathom.video/share/QpumFJ5rqto-8bEBzdGtqyXyEAUpyxJQ?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)
  - [Editorial content will link to programmatic pages for tool showcasing](https://fathom.video/share/QpumFJ5rqto-8bEBzdGtqyXyEAUpyxJQ?tab=summary&timestamp=521.0)

### Programmatic SEO Pages

  - [First page targeted for launch end of tomorrow or early next week](https://fathom.video/share/QpumFJ5rqto-8bEBzdGtqyXyEAUpyxJQ?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)
  - [Developer (Kirkland) working closely with design mockup](https://fathom.video/share/QpumFJ5rqto-8bEBzdGtqyXyEAUpyxJQ?tab=summary&timestamp=614.0)
  - [Initially building pages manually, then creating workflows for scaling](https://fathom.video/share/QpumFJ5rqto-8bEBzdGtqyXyEAUpyxJQ?tab=summary&timestamp=678.0)
  - [Healthcare identified as key industry focus, other industries to be determined](https://fathom.video/share/QpumFJ5rqto-8bEBzdGtqyXyEAUpyxJQ?tab=summary&timestamp=800.0)

### Content Distribution and Measurement

  - [Vapi team considering promotional activities for content launches](https://fathom.video/share/QpumFJ5rqto-8bEBzdGtqyXyEAUpyxJQ?tab=summary&timestamp=901.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide more detailed timelines for editorial and programmatic content](https://fathom.video/share/QpumFJ5rqto-8bEBzdGtqyXyEAUpyxJQ?tab=summary&timestamp=936.0)
  - [Using Google Search Console and Google Analytics as primary measurement tools](https://fathom.video/share/QpumFJ5rqto-8bEBzdGtqyXyEAUpyxJQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1390.0)
  - [Discussion on improving conversion tracking from organic channels](https://fathom.video/share/QpumFJ5rqto-8bEBzdGtqyXyEAUpyxJQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1288.0)
